preamble: A shift from the high-mid diphthong ui to the low fronting diphthong ai, involving Lowering and Unrounding of the first element.

examples.note: Unrounding and lowering of the nuclei in front-rounded or high-back-front diphthongs.

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
